simplesect.para: (c) 2023 AXO Track GmbH, Berlin. All rights reserved.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: This source file implements the update controller module for managing firmware updates in the AXO X1 device. The update controller handles the logic for handling OTA commands, firmware update confirmation/rejection, and managing the retry mechanism for firmware downloads. It utilizes the Finite State Machine (FSM) for coordinating different stages of the update process.
This source code is confidential and proprietary information of AXO Track GmbH, Berlin. You may not disclose, copy, or distribute this source code or any part thereof without the explicit permission
